value.found_quote: Claude Code uses a tiered permission system to balance power and safety... Allow rules let Claude Code use the specified tool without manual approval. Ask rules prompt for confirmation whenever Claude Code tries to use the specified tool. Deny rules prevent Claude Code from using the specified tool. Rules are evaluated in order: deny, then ask, then allow. The first match in that order determines the outcome...
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a tiered permission system that classifies tools by approval requirements (Read-only: no approval; Bash commands: yes; File modification: yes), governs whether Claude Code may use a given tool via allow/ask/deny rules, and evaluates those rules in deny-then-ask-then-allow order — all to balance power and safety. This directly substantiates every component of the claim.
